title: Tough As Looks
description: This modpack is combination of various challenging minecraft mods, which gives player a very hard time. You can even call the toughest minecraft mod ever existed.
body:
FEATURES

✔️ Completely Overhauled World Generation (Terrarith)

✔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

✔️ New Bosses and Mobs (Bosses of Mass Destruction, Frostiful)

✔️ Hundreds of NEW Dungeons & Structures (When Dungeons Arise, Explorify, Repurposed Structures)

✔️ QoL Features such as Waystones

✔️ Xaero's Minimap with Additional Features

✔️ 100+ Mods
